stories: Oil risk premium snaps back: crude dumps on an updated Iran “peace proposal” headline
Energy shock fades intraday: WTI settles near ~$102, Brent near ~$108
Japan steps into FX markets: first yen intervention in ~2 years, USD/JPY whipsaw risk jumps
World Bank flags a bigger macro overhang: energy prices projected up ~24% this year
Options tape (AAPL): $145 strike sees a flagged 500-contract trade (~$25K premium)
Options tape (AMSC): heavy May $50 strike activity (~1,183 contracts; ~$289.8K premium), flagged bearish
Wildcard: headline-velocity tape into the weekend raises gap/whipsaw risk across risk assets
